originalTitle: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
title: How worrying is the Ebola outbreak in DR Congo?
content: An outbreak in DR Congo has been declared a health emergency, with almost 250 suspected cases reported.

originalTitle: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo an international emergency
content: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
content: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.

title: DRC faces deadly Ebola resurgence amid worsening humanitarian crisis
content: The new Ebola outbreak has been reported in the towns of Rwampara, Mongwalu, and Bunia in northeastern DRC

title: Iranian civilians get defence training
content: Defence training sessions on light weapons were held for Iranian men and women in mosques in several cities.

content: Gov't funding cuts, war, tariffs and AI advancements intensify competition among recent graduates seeking stable jobs.

title: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia

originalTitle: Another handball 'mess' - is it time to change law?
title: Another handball 'mess' - is it time to change law?

title: 'We share same ambition' - Alonso named Chelsea's third boss in year
